name: CTOX Business OS store shelf
purpose: Self-contained browser-ESM retail-box artwork and three.js shelf renderer for the Business OS App Store.
provenance: adapted from the ctox-dev marketing showcase (same project ownership)
modifications: React removed, scroll container parameterized, palette fallback added; converted to no-build vanilla browser ESM using the vendored three.js r185 modules. Website asset paths and overlay/detail DOM were removed in favor of caller-provided URLs and callbacks.
